summary: Iteration 95 - Verified all P0 bug fixes: Admin Email+Password direct login (no OTP), WhatsApp template names, PAYMENT_LINK_EVENT webhook handling. All 10 backend tests passed, all frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin login-password endpoint correctly supports direct_login:true parameter - returns require_otp:false
WhatsApp template name correctly changed from 'payment_sucess_confirm' to 'payment_sucess_confirmation' (line 257 in cashfree_orders.py)
Payment link template correctly uses 'payment_link_asr' (line 398 in cashfree_orders.py)
PAYMENT_LINK_EVENT webhook handler added at line 1352 in cashfree_orders.py
Admin Login UI shows 'Email + Password' tab (not 'Email + OTP')
Staff Login still has all 3 tabs: Mobile OTP, Email + Password, Email + 2FA

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All login flows and UI elements verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified: (1) Admin Email+Password login with direct_login:true works - redirects directly to dashboard without OTP step, (2) WhatsApp template 'payment_sucess_confirmation' is correctly used for payment success messages, (3) 'payment_link_asr' template used for payment requests, (4) PAYMENT_LINK_EVENT webhook handler processes payment link events correctly. Staff login still works with all 3 tabs.

features_verified.1. Admin Login Direct (no OTP): VERIFIED - POST /api/admin/login-password with direct_login:true returns require_otp:false
features_verified.4. Admin Login Flow: VERIFIED - Fills email/password, clicks Login, redirects to /admin/dashboard directly (no OTP step)
features_verified.5. Staff Login Tabs: VERIFIED - Has all 3 tabs: Mobile OTP, Email + Password, Email + 2FA
features_verified.11. Homepage with floating icons: VERIFIED - All icons visible (Facebook, Instagram, Email, Phone, WhatsApp)
